lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repair and are not currently reliable. The exterior has major body damage, including large dents and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and damage to the upholstery.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and staining on the upholstery. All mechanical and electronic systems are functional.

Looking for a budget-friendly project or a vehicle with potential? This car is in poor condition and will need some significant mechanical and cosmetic TLC to get it back to its prime. It’s an ideal choice for a handy DIYer or someone looking for a low-cost fixer-upper! With a bit of work, this could be a great way to get on the road affordably.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver for someone looking for utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows clear signs of use, including some noticeable paint fading on the hood and several scuffs along the bumpers. There are a few small dings on the passenger side doors as well. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear on the driver's seat bolster and some minor staining in the carpet. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it will likely need new tires within the next 5,000 miles and the air conditioning takes a moment to get cold. Overall, it's a solid, functional car that has been maintained well enough to stay on the road but definitely shows its age.

This vehicle is in fair overall condition and would make a dependable commuter for someone willing to put in a little work. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the roof, and a small dent on the rear fender. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and the car drives well, although the suspension is beginning to feel a bit loose and will eventually need attention. Inside, the cabin is functional but the upholstery on the driver's seat is worn and there are some minor stains on the carpet. All major electronics work, though the radio display is occasionally dim. It is a functional, honest car that is priced to reflect its current state and maintenance needs.
Good condition.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and presented in excellent mechanical standing, it features a clean aesthetic and a comprehensive service history. A sophisticated choice for those who demand quality and consistency in their automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it has been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect choice if you're looking for something reliable that still looks fantastic on the road. It runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next big adventure. Come take it for a spin—I just know you're going to love how it handles!
This BMW M3 (E46) is a mechanically sound driver’s example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-
Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition, perfect for a driver who values reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional controls that ensure a comfortable ride. Mechanically, it has been kept up-to-date with regular servicing, providing a smooth and confident driving experience. Whether you’re commuting daily or taking a weekend getaway, this car offers the perfect balance of performance and value. It’s a solid, honest vehicle that’s ready for its next owner.

Presented for your consideration is a well-maintained example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. With a documented service history and a refined aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated balance of luxury and reliability for the discerning driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver. Offering a refined balance of performance and reliability, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it's looking for a new home! It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape—perfect for your daily commutes or fun weekend road trips. It runs smoothly and has been well-loved, so you can just hop in and go. I’m honestly going to miss it, but I’m excited for someone else to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut with a recently overhauled rear subframe and upgraded polyurethane bushings. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. Recent service includes a VANOS system refresh and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates at peak efficiency. Finished in Carbon Black with a well-preserved Nappa leather interior, this driver-focused machine offers exceptional turn-in response and mechanical feedback.
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition, offering a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin feels fresh and inviting; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all technological features—from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive infotainment system—operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular service intervals including recent fluid changes and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires offer excellent remaining tread. It’s a reliable and stylish choice for a buyer looking for a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined balance of performance and value. It presents in commendable condition, reflecting a history of consistent care and mechanical diligence. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automotive experience at a competitive price point.

This vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value, having been maintained to a high standard of mechanical and aesthetic excellence. It offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, ensuring immediate readiness for its next owner. A testament to enduring quality, this offering provides a sophisticated solution for those who demand reliability without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful. It's in great shape, super reliable, and honestly, a total joy to drive! I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s ready for its next big adventure with you. You’re going to love how it handles!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2) features the high-revving 3.6L flat-six M96 engine with VarioCam Plus, delivering linear power through a precise G96 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis dynamics remain sharp, utilizing a well-sorted MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry for exceptional lateral grip. Mechanical highlights include a documented IMS bearing upgrade and a recent rear main seal replacement, ensuring the longevity of the longitudinal boxer layout. Braking performance is anchored by four-piston monoblock calipers and ventilated, cross-drilled rotors. This example maintains excellent compression and smooth gear synchronization, offering a visceral, analog connection to the road with a functional limited-slip differential and a responsive throttle map.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, blending mechanical reliability with a well-preserved aesthetic. The exterior paint retains its original luster, showing only minor, expected signs of road use, while the interior remains exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and free of significant wear. Every feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts crisply, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures peace of mind for the next owner. It is a solid, honest car that has been cared for with a detail-oriented approach, making it a standout choice for anyone seeking quality and longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver, balancing robust performance with a refined aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a dependable driving experience without compromising on executive style. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for long-term value and operational excellence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust drivetrain, it stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. This offering provides a distinguished driving experience for the discerning professional seeking reliability without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways! Everything runs smoothly, and I’ve kept up with the maintenance so you can hit the road with confidence. I’m looking for a new owner who will appreciate it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain remains robust with documented VANOS servicing and essential subframe reinforcement already completed. The chassis is enhanced with adjustable Bilstein dampers and poly-bushed control arms, providing exceptional turn-in and lateral stability. Power is managed via the factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal traction on corner exit. Maintained with technical rigor and performance-oriented upgrades, this specimen offers a visceral, analog driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car in good condition. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean interior. Service records available.

This well-cared-for vehicle presents beautifully in its original factory paint, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful use. The interior is exceptionally clean, featuring supportive seating with no major wear and a suite of electronics that function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in strong standing; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts crisply, and it has been serviced regularly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Recent maintenance includes a fresh fluid flush and a multi-point inspection to ensure road-readiness. Equipped with premium alloy wheels and tires with plenty of life left, this car offers a reliable and comfortable driving experience for any discerning buyer.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. It offers a sophisticated driving experience and remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent ownership and consistent servicing.
